rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.1085, which governs conservator assignment for school safety noncompliance. No overlap in subject matter, funding, or operation.

_note: No conflict. The rule concerns school safety enforcement; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions. Unrelated provisions.
